LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT META PLATFORMS, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 23, AT 9 AM IN THIS DEPARTMENT PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES AND APPROVAL OF THE COURT. MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THE ABOVE AND EMAIL IT TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG PRIOR TO THE TIME SET FOR HEARING. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2026 Continued To Sep-02-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Apr-20-2026 Continued To Jul-23-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Meta Platforms, Inc.'s Motion to Compel Arbitration is CONTINUED TO July 23, AT 9 AM IN THIS DEPARTMENT per stipulation of the parties and approval of the Court.

The time for opposition and reply per CCP shall run from the new hearing date.

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order consistent with the above and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
